hero.title: Smart Business Management for Everyone
hero.subtitle: Froshiar helps businesses manage products, sales, inventory, customers, reports and online stores from one beautiful application.

features.heading: Everything your business needs
features.subheading: One app, every tool — built to feel effortless.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.description: Track stock levels, product variants, and low-stock alerts in real time.

salesPos.title: Sales & POS
salesPos.description: A fast, intuitive checkout built for busy counters and every device.

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.description: Keep customer details, purchase history, and balances in one place.

expenses.title: Expense Tracking
expenses.description: Record and categorize expenses to see exactly where money goes.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.description: Clear, visual reports that turn daily transactions into real insight.

onlineStore.title: Online Store
onlineStore.description: Turn your catalog into a shareable online store in minutes.

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
cloudSync.description: Your data stays backed up and in sync across every device.

multiLang.title: Multi-language Support
multiLang.description: A fully bilingual experience, including native Kurdish support.

about.heading: About Froshiar
about.paragraph: Froshiar is an all-in-one business management solution designed for shops, restaurants, pharmacies, supermarkets, cafés and many other businesses.

businessTypes.heading: Built for every kind of business
